Title: Nectar [V1]
Notes:
Pretty Boy wasn't originally going to be on the album, and was only intended for promotion,
as the description for the video said "NOT SONG". However, after Lil Yachty's reaction to the song
on Twitter, he likely got on the song afterwards. The final version of "Afterthought" was also not 
done until sometime after August 17th, 2020.
